sglang.title: fix /generate without sampling_params
sglang.author: toslunar
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:8000/generate --data-raw '{"text": "hello,"}'

causes Internal Server Error. The server log says
    if self.sampling_params.get("n", 1) != 1:
       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribu

sglang.title: feat: support token ids in /v1/completions
sglang.author: toslunar
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Improve compatibility with OpenAI API.
Modification
prompt of /v1/completions is

a string, array of strings, array of tokens, or array of token arrays.

https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/completions/create#completions-create-prompt
Support array of tokens and array of token

sglang.title: Deepseek v2 support
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: To use deepseek v2, please sepcify the --context-length or --max-num-reqs to avoid oom. The context length for deepseek is quite large, for the current static req_to_token layout, we cannot support large requests num and large context length at the same time.

vllm.title: [Model] Support Nemotron models (Nemotron-3, Nemotron-4, Minitron)
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #5722
Based off huggingface/transformers#31699 - Nemotron-3 loads and produces reasonable output. Nemotron-4 and the most recently released Minitron works and evals can be reproduced.
For CI, a Minitron-4B-Base GSM8k eval has been added to the lm-eval test suite.
The architecture is pretty simil

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Promote another index to int64_t
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In segmented_max_reduction, i is an index over the number of elements, so can exceed the max size of an int32_t. It's not biting us now, but this will prevent issues from arising here in the future.

vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Removed torchaudio since vLLM is not using it.
Removed a hotfix for Numpy as it's no longer needed.

vllm.title: [Misc][TPU] Support TPU in initialize_ray_cluster
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for TPUs in initializing Ray cluster.
Will also add HPU in the PR #6143

vllm.title: [Hardware] [Intel] Enable Multiprocessing and tensor parallel in CPU backend and update documentation
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enabled vLLM multiprocessing in CPU backend for improving async LLM engine performance and supporting TP.
The main changes include:

Use utilities from vllm.executor.multiproc_worker_utils to manage workers in CPUExecutor.
Enable tensor parallel for the CPU bcakend.
Provide a new env VLLM_CP

vllm.title: enforce eager mode with bnb quantization temporarily
vllm.author: chenqianfzh
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Temporarily enforce eager_mode in bitsandbytes quantization before the known issue (#5569) is fixed.

vllm.title: [TPU] Support collective communications in XLA devices
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support for collective communications in XLA devices (TPU). It is simply implemented by falling back to xm.all_reduce and xm.all_gather for TPU devices. One difference is the gather operation in logits processor, where gather is replaced by all-gather to meet the SPMD restriction in XLA

vllm.title: [Frontend] Factor out code for running uvicorn
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Following #6740, this PR further factors out common code for running the server, unifying the code structure between the OpenAI server entrypoint and the legacy server entrypoint. It also introduces a new module vllm.server for server-related code, which may be used for #6797.
cc @dtrifiro

vllm.title: [Bug Fix] Illegal memory access, FP8 Llama 3.1 405b
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Co-authored-by: Tyler Michael Smith tyler@neuralmagic.com
Should resolve: #6767, #6689 (comment) etc.
Currently the Sm90ColOrScalarBroadcast could read off the end of the scales buffer when the batch size is not a multiple of gemm tile size. Added a predicate tensor and used copy_if to prevent this.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model] Jamba assertions and no chunked prefill by default for Jamba
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#6666 enabled chunked prefill by default for long-context (>32K) models. Jamba is such a model, but it doesn't support chunked prefill.
This PR:

Doesn't enable chunked prefill by default for Jamba (currently the only model with seqlen agnostic layers)
Adds assertions inside Jamba code that make sur

vllm.title: [Model] H2O Danube3-4b
vllm.author: g-eoj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR mainly focuses on adding a head size of 120 for GPU inference, to support h2oai/h2o-danube3-4b-base.
Head sizes that are not a multiple of 16 aren't compatible with fp8 kv cache, so those tests are skipped.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use torch.set_num_threads() to configure parallelism in multiproc_gpu_executor
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
OMP_NUM_THREADS must be set before import torch in order for it to have an effect on the CPU thread parallelization of torch operations, such as when loading tensors to RAM.
I thought that I had resolved this issue with #6109, but, after further investigation, I it was not actually the right fix. Th

vllm.title: [Misc][VLM][Doc] Consolidate offline examples for vision language models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously we needed to create individual examples for each VLM because of the overhead of prompt formatting and complexity of launch arguments. This is no longer needed after the recent refactoring.
This PR consolidates these example files into one to clean up doc and example folder.
